title: Aquamira Universal Quick Connect 1/4" Tubing Splice Kit - Fits Frontier Filter
description:
Did you know you can instantly attach your Frontier Pro and Frontier Max water filters to hydration packs? The Frontier Universal Quick Connect (UQC) kit makes connecting your filter to hydration equipment a snap. Simply insert the Frontier UQC into your hydration system's quick adapter or hydration hose to make connecting your Frontier Pro or Frontier Max a breeze. The two button design prevents accidental disconnects and heavy-duty gaskets ensure no leaks. Available in 1/4" and 5/16" sizes, the Frontier UQC fits most tubes and hydration packs including CamelBak and Platypus. When you need a quick and easy way to connect your Frontier water filter to your hydration pack, reach for the Frontier Universal Quick Connect by Aquamira.
